item.title: Munjal Showa Ltd. is Rated Hold by MarketsMOJO
item.description: Munjal Showa Ltd. is currently rated 'Hold' by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 17 February 2026. While the rating change occurred on that date, the analysis and financial metrics discussed here reflect the stock's current position as of 12 March 2026, providing investors with an up-to-date view of the company’s fundamentals, valuation, financial trends, and technical outlook. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Faces Sharp Decline Amid Heavy Trading and Institutional Sell-Off
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a prominent player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has witnessed significant trading activity with one of the highest value turnovers on 12 Mar 2026. Despite this liquidity and investor interest, the stock continues its downward trajectory, reflecting growing institutional caution and deteriorating market sentiment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Gem Aromatics Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Gem Aromatics Ltd, a micro-cap player in the specialty chemicals sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 12 Mar 2026 as it hit its lower circuit limit, closing at ₹177.06, down 4.87% on the day. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Stove Kraft Ltd Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Mixed Market Sentiment
item.description: Stove Kraft Ltd, a prominent player in the Electronics & Appliances sector, witnessed significant trading activity on 12 Mar 2026, with a total traded value exceeding ₹153.9 crores. Despite a slight dip in the day’s price, the stock has demonstrated strong momentum over recent sessions, attracting considerable institutional interest and investor participation. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Auri Grow India Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Auri Grow India Ltd, a micro-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, surged to hit its upper circuit price limit on 12 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 4.35%. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further transactions and signalling significant unfilled demand in the market. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Supreme Engineering Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Supreme Engineering Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting robust buying interest despite a broadly negative market backdrop. The stock outperformed its sector and the Sensex, registering a maximum daily gain of 1.04%, signalling renewed investor focus amid subdued volumes and regulatory trading restrictions. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 6.67% to close at ₹0.16. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further transactions for the day. Despite the stock’s micro-cap status and a prevailing negative sentiment reflected in its strong sell rating, investor demand remained unfilled, signalling heightened market attention. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd Sees High Value Trading Amid Mixed Market Sentiment
item.description: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd (MAZDOCK), a key player in the Aerospace & Defense sector, witnessed significant value-based trading activity on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting heightened institutional interest despite a modest decline in share price. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, underscoring its resilience amid recent volatility. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd (symbol: OLAELEC) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks on 12 March 2026, registering a total traded volume exceeding 97 lakh shares. Despite this surge in trading activity, the stock continued its downward trajectory, closing near its 52-week low and underperforming key moving averages, signalling persistent selling pressure and cautious investor sentiment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Shrenik Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Shrenik Ltd, a micro-cap player in the miscellaneous sector, witnessed a robust rally on 12 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit price limit of ₹0.42, marking a maximum daily gain of 5.0%. This surge was driven by intense buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further transactions and leaving significant unfilled demand in the market. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Sanginita Chemicals Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Sanginita Chemicals Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Chemicals & Petrochemicals sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 5.0%. The stock closed at ₹14.28, reflecting robust buying interest despite a broadly negative market backdrop, with the Sensex and sector indices declining over 1% each. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Happiest Minds Technologies Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Institutional Interest
item.description: Happiest Minds Technologies Ltd, a key player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 12 March 2026. The stock demonstrated strong investor participation, with a total traded volume of 66.94 lakh shares and a turnover exceeding ₹281 crore, reflecting heightened market interest and institutional involvement despite a marginal day decline of 0.79%. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Kore Digital Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Kore Digital Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Telecom - Equipment & Accessories sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, closing at ₹131.65. The stock suffered a maximum daily loss of 4.98%, significantly underperforming its sector and the broader market amid intense selling pressure and unfilled supply, signalling heightened investor anxiety. Time: 13 minutes ago
